---
title: "Annual Conference Edition"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: scrartcl
    classoption:
      - numbers=noendperiod
      - DIV=15
    geometry:
      - top=1in
      - bottom=1in
      - left=1in
      - right=1in
    header-includes:
      - \usepackage{pdfpages}
---

\pagenumbering{roman}
{{< include annual-conference-preface.qmd >}}

\newpage
\tableofcontents

\newpage
\pagenumbering{arabic}
\setcounter{page}{1}

{{< include chronicles/_content.qmd >}}
